description: Record of payment of rent, ca. 1186. A payment of 100 wariq dirhams (for a period of one year's rent) is received from Abu Ishaq al-Adani. (Information from Gil, Documents, pp. 361 #92)
tags: 12th c, record of payment, rent, quittance, bara'a
description_he: רישום תשלום שכר דירה, כ-1186 לספירה; תשלום של 100 דרהם (לשנה) מאבו יצחק אל-עדני
